description:
Discovered during FRAC-24 impl. Four files in src/components/lab/ (DocumentBadge.tsx, TagFilter.tsx, ArchiveSearch.tsx, ArchiveToolbar.tsx) hardcode `const LAB_COLOR = '#6B4C9A'` — the old 'Fractal Bright' purple. The canonical lab palette per FRAC-24 is light=#E870A0 / deep=#C44878. Either update LAB_COLOR to a palette derivation or switch each consumer to import HOUSES and read palette.deep. 

Also from FRAC-21 audit §C6: the references include raw `border-[#6B4C9A]` and `ring-[#6B4C9A]` Tailwind arbitrary classes — replace with token-driven equivalents or move them to a CSS variable.

Not blocking DESIGN.md authoring (lab page bg already canonical). Cosmetic / consistency cleanup.
title: [Cleanup] Migrate src/components/lab/ LAB_COLOR (#6B4C9A old purple) to canonical lab palette (#E870A0/#C44878)
